ocr.text: In the Asia-Pacific insurance and reinsurance sector, Allianz SE reported various underwriting profit margins across segments
The Life Insurance segment achieved premiums amounting to $200,000,000, with claims totaling $120,000,000 and expenses
reaching $50,000,000, resulting in a profit margin of 10.0%, which is categorized as stable. Meanwhile, the Health Insurance
segment generated premiums of $150,000,000, incurred claims of $90,000,000, and faced expenses of $40,000,000, also
yielding a profit margin of 10.0%, but is classified as growing. The Property Insurance segment reported premiums of
$180,000,000, with claims at $100,000,000 and expenses of $60,000,000, maintaining a profit margin of 10.0%, designated as
stable. Lastly, the Casualty Insurance segment recorded premiums of $120,000,000, claims of $70,000,000, and expenses of
$30,000,000, which similarly resulted in a profit margin of 10.0% and is categorized as stable.
